summary: The diff implements most of the requested features: REQ-1 (renaming 'Chat with me' to 'Chat with Nobita' in navigation, dashboard, and chat page), REQ-2 (rule-based NLP chatbot engine in botResponses.ts with Nobita persona), and REQ-3 (3 new games: GadgetClickerPage, ExamQuizPage, WhackADoraemonPage with scores and restart buttons). The App.tsx route registration for new games is not visible in the diff but may be present in a truncated or unshown file.

missing_requirements.requirement: All new game routes are registered in App.tsx.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not include any changes to App.tsx. The new game routes (/games/gadget-clicker, /games/exam-quiz, /games/whack-a-doraemon) need to be registered there, but no App.tsx modification is shown in the diff summary.
